text:

Author: dmgk

Log:
  New port: sysutils/3mux

  Terminal multiplexer with out-of-the-box support for
  search, mouse-controlled scrollback, and i3-like
  keybindings.

  WWW: https://github.com/aaronjanse/3mux

  PR:		245675
  Submitted by:	Lewis Cook <vulcan@wired.sh>
